title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese presents three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for multiplying output with Claude Code: leveraging LLM knowledge bases, auto-research capabilities, and context engineering. The video breaks down these practices as applicable to any developer's workflow.
